description: CompositionPale blue spaghetti top made of a knitted polyester blend fabric, has elastication detail at the centre front and elasticated back necklineFitRegularWash careRinse separatelyGentle handwash in mild detergentDo not bleach or scrub on embroidery & printLine dry inside outLow ironThe crush-worthy, mood lifting colouring with updated design details in this top, fresh from sepia's design studio, is the season's summer essential. Style this with form fitting jeggings and ballet flats for a sweet, girly vibe. For a vintage feel, throw on a faded and worn denim jacket, denims and a floral scarf with this piece. Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
